name: box2048
description: Hybrid of 2048, Angry Birds and Tetris — drop cubes, merge same values, don't overflow the field.

scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && cap sync && node scripts/setup-android.mjs
scripts.android:debug: npm run build && cap sync android && node scripts/setup-android.mjs && cd android && chmod +x gradlew && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:release: npm run build && cap sync android && node scripts/setup-android.mjs && cd android && chmod +x gradlew && ./gradlew bundleRelease
scripts.android:log: adb logcat -s Capacitor chromium System.out YandexAds
